Update to v5.16.4

This updates to v5.16.4.

It brings a bug fix:

- Changes from 5.16.3:

      - FIXED: Properly calculate annotations for speeds, durations and distances when waypoints are used with mapmatching


Poudriere QA done on 10.3, 10.4, 11.1 and 12-CURRENT.
